scripts.test: timeout 180s env NODE_ENV=test node --test --test-timeout=30000 --test-force-exit --import tsx src/**/*.test.ts
scripts.test:coverage: mkdir -p coverage && timeout 300s env NODE_ENV=test node --test --test-timeout=30000 --test-force-exit --experimental-test-coverage --test-coverage-lines=80 --test-coverage-functions=80 --test-coverage-branches=80 --test-coverage-include='src/**/*.ts' --test-coverage-exclude='src/**/*.test.ts' --test-reporter=spec --test-reporter=lcov --test-reporter-destination=stdout --test-reporter-destination=coverage/lcov.info --import tsx src/**/*.test.ts && node ../scripts/coverage/normalize-lcov-paths.mjs coverage/lcov.info server
